case_title: DANIELLE EDWARDS VS. 2361 MISSION STREET, LLC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDWARDS, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT 2361 MISSION STREET, LLC DBA EL CAPITAN HOTEL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. "DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE DEFENDANT" PER ROA ON 04/23/13. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SAM PATEL-MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
